tasks.build: deno run -A npm:typescript/tsc && cp -r src/types dist/ && deno run --allow-read --allow-write scripts/fix-dts-imports.ts
tasks.typecheck: deno check src/index.ts src/runtime/*.ts src/vite/*.ts e2e/*.ts e2e/tests/*.ts e2e/fixtures/test-extension/src/*.ts e2e/fixtures/test-extension/*.ts
